artPrompt: A swelling amorphous sludge ooze rearing up from a flooded parking lot, its translucent murky-green body bulging with absorbed debris and glowing bioluminescent veins, sickly light pulsing as it grows on what the town spills. Rusted pipes and toxic runoff ring its base under a bruised stormy sky. The mounting ooze climbs the wide landscape frame, dripping tendrils reaching upward. Wide 4:3 landscape, Gruul murky green and rust red, toxic menace, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Toxic Sludge Ooze
text:
Whenever you roll one or more dice or flip one or more coins, put a +1/+1 counter on Toxic Sludge Ooze. (It grows on what the town spills.)
{1}{G}: Toxic Sludge Ooze gains trample until end of turn.
flavorText: It used to be a parking lot. Then it rained.
